data.name: Next Girl, Please 🎬
data.detailed_description:
Step into the casting room of a one-of-a-kind adult studio in a vibrant urban fantasy world in this adult visual novel and simulation experience. You’ve just been hired as a casting assistant — but this job is anything but ordinary.

Over 10 intense days, you’ll screen a wild variety of fantasy girls, each with their own quirks, talents, and secrets. Your goal? Pick the most promising candidates for a provocative show… and outperform your rival to secure your place in the studio.

Every decision matters. Who gets in, who gets rejected, and how you handle each situation will shape your reputation — and ultimately decide which of the three endings you unlock.

Will you play it safe, or take risks for bigger rewards?

🔥 Features:

🎭 Choice-driven narrative with visual novel-style dialogues
🧝‍♀️ Diverse fantasy девушек with unique personalities
🧠 Increasingly complex screening mechanics and challenges
📊 Reputation system affecting story outcomes and endings
🌆 Stylish urban fantasy setting
🌶️ Interactive adult-themed gameplay elements

data.short_description: Screen fantasy girls for a bold urban adult studio in this “Papers, Please”-style experience. Make tough calls, build your reputation, and outshine your rival across 10 intense days to unlock multiple endings. Who’s in… and who’s out? 🎬
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
